name: China Discovery — Highlights
title: China Discovery — Highlights
shortDescription: A journey combining wildlife encounters with historical exploration — giant pandas, high-speed trains, Terracotta Warriors, and Jiuzhaigou's crystalline lakes.
highlights: Giant pandas at Dujiangyan Panda Base
Terracotta Warriors — Eighth Wonder of the World
Kuan and Zhai alleys in Chengdu

itinerary.title: Auckland — Chengdu
itinerary.description: Evening departure from Auckland.

itinerary.title: Chengdu Area
itinerary.description: Visit Giant Buddha at Lingyun Mountain. Return to Chengdu.

itinerary.title: Chengdu
itinerary.description: Dujiangyan Panda Base by battery-powered vehicle. Ancient irrigation project tour.

itinerary.title: Chengdu — Jiuzhaigou
itinerary.description: Morning exploration of Kuan and Zhai alleys. Fast train to Jiuzhaigou Valley.

itinerary.title: Jiuzhaigou Valley
itinerary.description: Full-day reserve: four scenic areas, plateau lakes, waterfalls, calcified beaches.

itinerary.title: Jiuzhaigou — Chengdu
itinerary.description: Huanglong Scenic Area (elevation 1,700–5,588m). Return by fast train.

itinerary.title: Chengdu — Xi'an
itinerary.description: Fast train to Xi'an. Bell Tower and Huimin Street exploration.

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Terracotta Warriors, Circle Vision Movie, Bronze Chariot. Evening dumpling dinner.

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Old City Wall and Big Wild Goose Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Chengdu
itinerary.description: Free morning. High-speed train to Chengdu. Airport transfer.

itinerary.title: Return to New Zealand
itinerary.description: Arrive back in New Zealand.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Discovery — Beijing & Shanghai
title: China Discovery — Beijing & Shanghai
shortDescription: Step into the heart of China experiencing the Great Wall, Forbidden City, Terracotta Warriors, and the contrast between ancient Beijing and modern Shanghai.
highlights: Hutong pedi-cab tour with family visit
Summer Palace with Marble Boat and Long Corridor
Xi'an City Wall and Big Wild Goose Pagoda

itinerary.title: Auckland — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Evening departure from Auckland.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Beijing
itinerary.description: Arrive Shanghai, transfer to Beijing. Hotel check-in, free time.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Tian'anmen Square, National Centre for the Performing Arts, Forbidden City, Beihai Park, silk factory. Optional: evening acrobatic show.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Great Wall at Juyongguan section, jade carving factory, Bird's Nest and Water Cube photo stop.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Hutong pedi-cab tour through old city neighbourhoods with family visit. Summer Palace with Marble Boat and Long Corridor.

itinerary.title: Beijing — Xi'an
itinerary.description: High-speed train G89 to Xi'an (15:00–19:12).

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Terracotta Warriors (2,000-year-old site), Circle Vision Movie, Bronze Chariot. Evening dumpling dinner.

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: City Wall and Big Wild Goose Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Departure
itinerary.description: Small Wild Goose Pagoda Museum, Huimin Street. Flight to Beijing/Shanghai for Auckland connection.

itinerary.title: Return to Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive in Auckland.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Discovery — Essentials
title: China Discovery — Essentials
shortDescription: A comprehensive journey through China's iconic destinations — Shanghai, Suzhou, Wuxi, Hangzhou, Beijing, and Xi'an — covering all the must-see highlights.
highlights: Great Wall of China at Juyongguan
West Lake scenic beauty in Hangzhou
Yu Garden and The Bund in Shanghai
Xinshi Ancient Water Town with Hanfu experience

itinerary.title: Auckland — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Flight to Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Suzhou
itinerary.description: Arrive Shanghai, transfer to Suzhou. Master of the Nets Garden, Panmen gate, Shantang Street.

itinerary.title: Suzhou — Wuxi
itinerary.description: Silk factory, Lingshan Grand Buddha scenic area, Purple Sand Museum.

itinerary.title: Wuxi
itinerary.description: Three Kingdoms City (warship tour, horse battle show), Pearl Exhibition Center, Ancient Canal boat tour.

itinerary.title: Wuxi — Xinshi Town
itinerary.description: Xinshi Town (thousand-year-old settlement). Traditional Hanfu costume photo experience. Afternoon tea.

itinerary.title: Xinshi — Hangzhou
itinerary.description: Free time until 10 AM. West Lake scenic area (Hua Gang Guan Yu, boat tour, Su Causeway), Leifeng Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Hangzhou — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Hangzhou International Expo Center (G20 venue), Six Harmonies Pagoda, Meijiawu Tea Plantation with Longjing tea tasting.

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: The Bund (52 buildings), Yu Garden (Ming Dynasty), World Cultural Heritage Art Exhibition Center, Nanjing Road.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Beijing
itinerary.description: Fast train to Beijing. Hotel check-in, free time.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Tian'anmen Square, National Centre for the Performing Arts, Forbidden City, Beihai Park, silk factory.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Great Wall at Juyongguan section, jade carving factory, Olympic Park (Bird's Nest, Water Cube).

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Pedi-cab Hutong tour with family home visit. Summer Palace (Marble Boat, Long Corridor).

itinerary.title: Beijing — Xi'an
itinerary.description: Morning free time. Train G89 (15:00–19:12) to Xi'an.

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Terracotta Warriors, Circle Vision Movie, Bronze Chariot. Xi'an dumpling dinner.

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Old City Wall, Big Wild Goose Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Departure
itinerary.description: Small Wild Goose Pagoda Museum, Huimin Street. Flight to Beijing connecting to Auckland.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive Auckland. Tour ends.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Discovery — Shanghai & Surroundings
title: China Discovery — Shanghai & Surroundings
shortDescription: A journey exploring water towns, Buddhist temples, classical gardens, and modern Shanghai experiences across the Yangtze River Delta region.
highlights: Suzhou classical gardens and Shantang Street
Three Kingdoms City with live battle show
Xinshi Ancient Water Town with Hanfu photos
West Lake boat tour and Leifeng Pagoda in Hangzhou

itinerary.title: Auckland — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Depart Auckland Airport.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Suzhou
itinerary.description: Arrive Shanghai, transfer to Suzhou. Master of the Nets Garden, Panmen, Shantang Street.

itinerary.title: Suzhou — Wuxi
itinerary.description: Silk factory visit, Lingshan Grand Buddha, Purple Sand Museum.

itinerary.title: Wuxi
itinerary.description: Three Kingdoms City (warship, live horse battle show), Pearl Exhibition Center, Ancient Canal boat tour.

itinerary.title: Wuxi — Xinshi
itinerary.description: Xinshi Ancient Water Town (thousand-year-old settlement). Hanfu costume photos. Afternoon tea. Hot pot dinner.

itinerary.title: Xinshi — Hangzhou
itinerary.description: Free time until 10 AM. West Lake scenic area (boat tour, Su Causeway), Leifeng Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Hangzhou — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Hangzhou International Expo Center, Six Harmonies Pagoda, Meijiawu Tea Plantation with Longjing tea.

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: The Bund, Yu Garden (Ming Dynasty), World Cultural Heritage Art Exhibition Center, Nanjing Road.

itinerary.title: Shanghai — Departure
itinerary.description: Morning free time. Afternoon airport transfer.

itinerary.title: Auckland
itinerary.description: Morning arrival in Auckland.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and second-class train
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $10 per day per person)

name: China Discovery — Beijing, Xi'an & Guilin
title: China Discovery — Beijing, Xi'an & Guilin
shortDescription: A guided group tour from Beijing to Guilin covering the Great Wall, Terracotta Warriors, and Li River cruise through karst landscapes with 5-star accommodation.
highlights: Exclusive Impression of Liu Sanjie landscape performance
Regional cuisine: Roast Duck, hotpot, Yangshuo Beer Fish
Li River cruise through karst mountain scenery

itinerary.title: Beijing Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrive PEK airport, hotel transfer, free time.
itinerary.accommodation: Sofitel Beijing Central or Grand Metropark Hotel Beijing

itinerary.title: Great Wall & Old City
itinerary.description: Mutianyu Great Wall, Nanluogu Lane historic neighbourhood. Beijing Copper Hotpot dinner.
itinerary.accommodation: Sofitel Beijing Central or Grand Metropark Hotel Beijing

itinerary.title: Free Day in Beijing
itinerary.description: Self-guided or optional excursions: Beijing City Highlights ($109) or Chengde Bullet Train ($199).
itinerary.accommodation: Sofitel Beijing Central or Grand Metropark Hotel Beijing

itinerary.title: Beijing — Xi'an
itinerary.description: Tiananmen Square, Forbidden City, Beijing Roast Duck lunch, Temple of Heaven. Evening flight to Xi'an.

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Terracotta Warriors (UNESCO), Ancient City Wall, Big Wild Goose Pagoda, Grand Tang Dynasty Ever-bright City.

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Guilin
itinerary.description: Small Wild Goose Pagoda, Bell Tower, Drum Tower, Shadow Play performance. Fly to Guilin.

itinerary.title: Guilin — Yangshuo
itinerary.description: 4-star Li River cruise to Yangshuo. Explore West Street. Evening 'Impression of Liu Sanjie' performance.

itinerary.title: Yangshuo Scenic Tour
itinerary.description: Ten-Mile Gallery scenic drive, cable car to Ruyi Peak. Evening boat tour of four lakes.

itinerary.title: Guilin Departure
itinerary.description: Reed Flute Cave, Elephant Trunk Hill, Dongxi Alley (Ming/Qing district). Airport transfer.

name: China Discovery — Yangtze
title: China Discovery — Yangtze
shortDescription: An immersive journey through China's imperial heartland, combining ancient monuments with modern experiences and a luxury river cruise through the Three Gorges.
highlights: Forbidden City and Temple of Heaven in Beijing
Ancient City Wall and Tang Dynasty performances
Shanghai's modern skyline and historic districts

itinerary.title: Beijing Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrive PEK airport, hotel transfer.
itinerary.accommodation: Sofitel Beijing Central or Grand Metropark Hotel Beijing

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Mutianyu Great Wall, Nanluogu Lane. Beijing Copper Hotpot dinner.
itinerary.accommodation: Sofitel Beijing Central or Grand Metropark Hotel Beijing

itinerary.title: Beijing Free Day
itinerary.description: Optional: Summer Palace/Qianmen/Acrobatics or Chengde Bullet Train excursion.
itinerary.accommodation: Sofitel Beijing Central or Grand Metropark Hotel Beijing

itinerary.title: Beijing — Xi'an
itinerary.description: Tiananmen Square, Forbidden City, Beijing Roast Duck lunch, Temple of Heaven. Evening flight to Xi'an.

itinerary.title: Xi'an
itinerary.description: Terracotta Warriors, Ancient City Wall, Big Wild Goose Pagoda, Grand Tang Dynasty Ever-bright City.

itinerary.title: Xi'an — Chongqing
itinerary.description: Small Wild Goose Pagoda, Bell and Drum Towers, Shadow Play. Afternoon flight to Chongqing.

itinerary.title: Chongqing — Yangtze Cruise
itinerary.description: Jiefangbei Pedestrian Street, Hongyadong, Liziba Station light rail. Evening board Victoria Sabrina cruise.

itinerary.title: Yangtze Cruise
itinerary.description: Shuanggui Mountain. Captain's Welcome Reception.

itinerary.title: Yangtze Cruise
itinerary.description: Qutang Gorge, Wu Gorge, Goddess River by smaller boat. Captain's Farewell Banquet.

itinerary.title: Cruise — Yichang — Shanghai
itinerary.description: Three Gorges Dam visit. Jingzhou Ancient Wall. Afternoon flight to Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: Jinmao Tower 88th floor, Wukang Building, Tian Zi Fang, The Bund, City God's Temple Ancient Street.

itinerary.title: Shanghai Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast. Airport transfer.

name: China Discovery — Yunnan Explorer
title: China Discovery — Yunnan Explorer
shortDescription: Explore the natural wonders and cultural heritage of Yunnan through signature attractions including limestone karst formations, snow-capped mountains, ethnic performances, and historic towns.
highlights: Stone Forest Scenic Area — No.1 Wonder under Heaven
Jade Dragon Snow Mountain via cable car
Dayan (Lijiang Old Town) — UNESCO World Heritage
Dali ancient city and Erhai Lake

itinerary.title: Kunming
itinerary.description: Arrival in Kunming, 'City of Eternal Spring'. Guide transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kunming — Lijiang
itinerary.description: Morning visit Stone Forest Scenic Area. Afternoon explore old town or Flower and Bird Market. Evening fast train to Lijiang.

itinerary.title: Lijiang
itinerary.description: Visit Jade Dragon Snow Mountain via cable car, then Blue Moon Valley by battery car. Evening 'Impression of Lijiang' performance (outdoor Zhang Yimou production at 3,100m).

itinerary.title: Lijiang — Tiger Leaping Gorge
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Tiger Leaping Gorge and First Bend of Yangtze River. Optional visit to Dayan, Lijiang's UNESCO Old Town.

itinerary.title: Lijiang — Dali
itinerary.description: Drive to Dali. Visit ancient city, Dali Museum, and boat trip on Erhai Lake.

itinerary.title: Dali Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to airport for departure flight.

inclusions: Admission to all sightseeing locations per itinerary
